scripts.dev: mkdir -p dist && cp index.html dist/index.html && bunx concurrently "bunx @tailwindcss/cli -i src/index.css -o dist/index.css --watch" "bun build src/main.tsx --outdir dist --entry-naming main.js --watch" "bun --watch run server.ts"
scripts.build: bun install && bunx @tailwindcss/cli -i src/index.css -o dist/index.css && bun build src/main.tsx --outdir dist --entry-naming main.js && cp index.html dist/index.html && bun build server.ts --packages=external --target=node --outfile=dist/server.js
